meta.question: What model contains a message named 'Asiakas tiaa ruoan'?
meta.finalAnswer:
The model containing a message named "Asiakas tilaa ruoan" (likely the intended message from your query "Asiakas tiaa ruoan") is **"Koreografiakaavio"**.

This Finnish phrase translates to "Customer orders food" in English.

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?msg ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?msg bbo:name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Asiakas tiaa ruoan")))
  ?msg a ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?msg ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?msg bbo:name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("ruoan")))
  ?msg a ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?model ?modelName WHERE {
  ?msg bbo:name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Asiakas tilaa ruoan")))
  ?msg a bboExt:Message .
  ?msg tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model bbo:name ?modelName .
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>

prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?msg ?choreo ?defs ?model ?modelName WHERE {
  ?msg bbo:name "Asiakas tilaa ruoan" .
  ?msg tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model bbo:name ?modelName .
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?msg ?name ?parent ?parentType WHERE {
  ?msg bbo:name "Asiakas tilaa ruoan" .
  ?msg tai:belongsTo ?parent .
  ?parent a ?parentType .
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?defs ?model ?modelName WHERE {
  ?msg bbo:name "Asiakas tilaa ruoan" .
  ?msg tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs a bboExt:Definitions .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model bbo:name ?modelName .
}
LIMIT 25
